examples: Yes, I realize this description is not very proscriptive;
Yet the more proscriptive European vision may better suit consumer and industry demands for certainty.
While this focus may be justified, it is fundamentally more reactive than proscriptive.
Under Engish insolvency law, which is less proscriptive than Ireland's new guidelines, "reasonable" day-to-day expenses for bankrupts include holidays, mobile phones and video rentals.
